EPO 50-100 IU/kg 3x/week for enhanced oxygen delivery
IGF-1 LR3 variant: 40-80 mcg/day, half-life 20+ hours, more potent than native I
Rule of thumb: 10g carbs per 1 IU insulin minimum to prevent hypoglycemia

Tirzepatide: dual GIP/GLP-1 agonist, improves insulin sensitivity dramatically

GH should be administered 30-60 minutes before insulin for optimal receptor prim
